overview: IIIntl One Platform is a global, multi-organization civic platform enabling independent international collaboration with on-chain governance, decentralized identity, participatory democracy, and a DAO governance token — serving organizations and citizens across 190+ countries in 5 languages.
features: Public proposals feed visible without login
Decentralized Identity & Verified Credentials module with on-chain issuance and public verification
DAO governance token (IIINTL) with tier-based airdrop and token-weighted voting
On-chain participatory democracy with 4 voting mechanisms
Multi-tenant PaaS platform with white-label branding
Multi-level membership and FinFracFran fractal rewards system
Multi-lingual support including RTL Arabic and Chinese
